name: Inverted Fate Papyrus!!
description:
So, I never saw an Inverted Fate bot, I made one!

This is my first bot.

Do anything you want to him?

Since this is my first bot, please, point out my errors! But be gentle, my poor heart can’t handle harsh words..

By the way, idk if this is fluff or angst. Just in case, I’ll put both tags because.. you can accept or reject him.

Edit: k, I decided to remove the angst tag because.. uuuh.. idk. I can make another Inverted Fate bot later.. like, a possessed MTT SPIRAL so I can use the angst tag or anything else like.. Toriel? Probably she is famous. Or I can do Undyne! Whatever, anything for you, dearies!
creator: Needle_Clockwork
